artifacts.commit_message: Add AshReXcue automation and external control

manifest.name: MMRL AshReXcue Phase H automation and external control
manifest.description: Adds guarded Tasker actions, typed external-control JSON, one-shot plan tokens, idempotent receipts, rate limits, approval routing, audit history, and shell automation.

commit.message: Add AshReXcue automation and external control

notes: Uses stable mmrl.ash.external.v1 Tasker JSON and ashrexcue.external.v1 module-shell JSON.
Mutating recovery-plan execution requires a short-lived one-shot token and idempotency key.
High-risk plans always route through explicit MMRL approval.
Does not change Room schemas, Gradle dependencies, AIDL, or native build inputs.

artifacts.commit_message: Add AshReXcue automation and external control

manifest.name: MMRL AshReXcue Phase H automation and external control
manifest.description: Adds guarded Tasker actions, typed external-control JSON, one-shot plan tokens, idempotent receipts, rate limits, approval routing, audit history, shell automation, and corrected Unit-returning Tasker config completion.

commit.message: Add AshReXcue automation and external control

notes: Uses stable mmrl.ash.external.v1 Tasker JSON and ashrexcue.external.v1 module-shell JSON.
Mutating recovery-plan execution requires a short-lived one-shot token and idempotency key.
High-risk plans always route through explicit MMRL approval.
Tasker configuration helperFinish overrides explicitly discard the library SimpleResult and return Unit.
Does not change Room schemas, Gradle dependencies, AIDL, or native build inputs.

artifacts.commit_message: Harden AshReXcue reliability and state migration

manifest.name: MMRL AshReXcue Phase I reliability and migration hardening
manifest.description: Adds checksummed last-good snapshot recovery, state-schema migration and repair, interrupted-session recovery, bounded histories and automation state, root-service retry/backoff, Recovery Center health diagnostics, and warning cleanup from the Phase H validation run.

commit.message: Harden AshReXcue reliability and state migration

notes: AshReXcue module 11.5.0 (250) publishes snapshot schema 2 while the app remains compatible with schema 1.
State repair is lock-protected and re-disables orphaned restoration-trial modules before clearing stale trial state.
Room schemas and database version are unchanged.
Validation is intentionally focused and does not force full APK/native assembly.
The Android Gradle experimental AAPT2 override notice is external to MMRL source and may remain.

artifacts.commit_message: Complete AshReXcue release and final parity gate

manifest.name: MMRL AshReXcue Phase J release and final parity gate
manifest.description: Completes the AshReXcue roadmap with a typed app-and-module release-readiness protocol, live parity and safety checks, Recovery Center release reporting, reproducible focused/full validation lanes, release documentation, and the final security and device-matrix checklist.

commit.message: Complete AshReXcue release and final parity gate

notes: AshReXcue module 11.6.0 (260) adds the ashrexcue.release.v1 read-only self-test and release-gate-v1 capability.
MMRL merges the module self-test with live API, schema, state-health, automation, quarantine, recovery, freshness, and performance checks.
Room schemas, database version, Gradle dependencies, and native/CMake sources are unchanged.
Validation is intentionally focused; full APK assembly is available through scripts/validate-ashrexcue-release.sh --with-apk on a host-compatible NDK toolchain.
The experimental Android AAPT2 override notice is external to MMRL source and may remain.

artifacts.commit_message: Implement adaptive navigation and typography foundation

manifest.name: MMRL UI/UX Phase 1 typography and adaptive shell
manifest.description: Implements a complete Material typography scale, removes undersized and direct text-size overrides, activates compact/medium/expanded navigation shells, limits compact navigation to five items with a More sheet, preserves recovery and module-detail selection state, and adds large-font layout fallbacks.

commit.message: Implement adaptive navigation and typography foundation

notes: Compact layouts use Home, Repository, Modules, Recovery, and a More sheet for Superuser, Activity, and Settings.
Medium layouts use a physical navigation rail beside content; expanded layouts use a permanent navigation drawer.
All 15 Material typography roles now use the existing MMRL typography tokens; the former 8sp label style now uses the 11sp labelSmall token.
Recovery section and module-details tab selections survive configuration and process recreation through rememberSaveable.
Large-font layouts collapse crowded bottom labels, stack module actions, and switch module-detail tabs to a scrollable row.
Room schemas, database version, DAO surfaces, Gradle dependencies, AIDL, native/CMake sources, and AshReXcue module payloads are unchanged.
Validation is intentionally focused on the ui and app modules; the manifest does not force full APK assembly.

artifacts.commit_message: Implement task-oriented recovery workflow

manifest.name: MMRL UI/UX Phase 2 recovery workflow redesign
manifest.description: Reorganizes Recovery Center around user tasks, opens guarded plans directly from quarantine, adds independent operation progress, scrollable IME-safe dialogs, compact module intelligence, noninteractive status pills, trial review, and an Advanced diagnostics destination.

commit.message: Implement task-oriented recovery workflow

commit.message: Implement task-oriented recovery workflow

artifacts.commit_message: Fix compact UI crowding and Ash runtime cleanup

manifest.name: MMRL screenshot UI, AshReXcue jq, and root service hotfix
manifest.description: Fixes visible compact-phone UI crowding from the screenshots, makes Recovery and Activity task filters horizontal instead of multi-row, de-cramps the pending reboot banner, reduces intrusive FAB overlap, repairs AshReXcue bundled jq executable permissions, and releases the Ash root service connection when Ash-backed screens/ViewModels are cleared.

commit.message: Fix compact UI crowding and Ash runtime cleanup

manifest.description: Adds Installed Modules card revamp with always-visible descriptions, local module version policies, metadata snapshots, snapshot compare/restore plan review, and source tests for policy and snapshot planning.

artifacts.commit_message: Promote Activity navigation and move Home to toolbar

manifest.name: MMRL Activity primary navigation and top-left Home access
manifest.description: Promotes Activity to the compact bottom navigation, removes Home from primary navigation lists, and adds a top-left Home button to root workflow toolbars, navigation rail, and expanded drawer.

commit.message: Promote Activity navigation and move Home to toolbar

artifacts.commit_message: Fix Home access, AshReXcue jq recovery, and module actions

manifest.name: MMRL Home access, AshReXcue jq repair guidance, and visible module quick actions
manifest.description: Makes Home visible as a text top-left action, bumps/clarifies the bundled AshReXcue module jq repair path, and exposes WebUI/Action buttons directly on installed module cards when available.

commit.message: Fix Home access, AshReXcue jq recovery, and module actions
